basics.name: Pavitra Golchha
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Software engineer with a focus on building performant, resource-efficient systems end-to-end. Strong across backend infrastructure (serverless, event-driven, IaC), systems programming (Rust), and product engineering (web/Android). Comfortable as a sole engineer owning a full stack, from architecture to deployment and QA.

work.name: Infocusp
work.description: Backend & DevOps for a US-based F&B retail chain
highlights: Working on multiple concurrent systems powering restaurant/store operations including mobile ordering, kitchen operations, and in-store digital signage for a US-based F&B retail chain.
Among the engineers who designed and architected backend APIs, AWS infrastructure, and serverless systems from the ground up.
Own infrastructure and DevOps across AWS Lambda, API Gateway, Terraform IaC, authentication, DNS, email infrastructure, security, and operational cost management.
Performed load/stress testing and optimized backend API flows for sub-second p90 latency under production traffic.
Fine-tuned Lambda runtime and infrastructure configuration to balance latency and cost efficiency (~$200/month per environment handling 10K MAU).
Implemented RBAC, phone-number authentication, and large-scale webhook ingestion pipelines for Square and DoorDash using queue-driven event processing.

Built a real-time Kitchen Display System using AWS IoT Core with MQTT/WebSocket-based communication and event-driven serverless architecture; shipped the full system within 3 weeks by leveraging AI-assisted development workflows.

Developed Android TV software for scheduled campaigns, menus, and promotional media across franchise store locations; optimized for low-resource TV hardware using disk-cached HD video playback, push-driven scheduling, and coroutine-based background execution; delivered end-to-end within 2 months.

work.name: Infocusp
work.description: Sole engineer on end-to-end product builds (Chrome extension & Aztec wallet)
highlights: Led two back-to-back products end-to-end as the sole engineer — architecting, building, deploying, and QA-ing complete systems from scratch.
Designed and single-handedly built a Sales/Leads Chrome Extension integrating Salesforce and Gmail workflows into the browser new-tab experience.
Owned the full stack including frontend architecture, AWS serverless backend infrastructure, Terraform IaC, deployment pipelines, and QA.
Implemented secure Gmail background scanning systems and achieved Google CASA security certification.
Built Stripe-powered billing/subscription workflows and authentication federation using OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect.
Architected and developed a production-ready privacy-focused browser wallet and DApp for Aztec Network, an Ethereum Layer 2 focused on programmable privacy using zero-knowledge proofs.
Implemented secure cryptographic flows, transaction signing, and key-management systems for privacy-preserving smart contracts.
Designed state-machine driven UI systems handling complex asynchronous wallet and blockchain interaction flows.

work.name: Infocusp
work.description: Data engineering for a sleep-tech wearable device
work.summary: Data engineering for a sleep-tech wearable device used by 100K+ users in the US market.
highlights: Built a data pipeline from scratch in AWS Glue using PySpark, processing tens of GBs of time-series sensor data daily from a health-monitoring wearable device deployed to 100K+ users.
Optimized pipeline runtime from 3 hours down to 15 minutes through streaming data from S3, intelligent partitioning, optimized joins, and Glue memory/DPU tuning.
Developed an interactive data dashboard reducing cross-functional team troubleshooting time by 80%.
Conducted quarterly statistical analysis on user behavior patterns across 10K+ user samples for product insights.
Ramped up on Apache Spark from the ground up to achieve full technical competence within the first few months on the job.

work.name: Kodular
work.summary: US-registered no-code Android app development platform.
highlights: Co-founded a US-registered no-code Android app development platform enabling visual Android app development using Blockly.
Architected and maintained distributed build infrastructure compiling 10K+ user projects daily into APK and AAB formats.
Developed and maintained 150+ Android components using Android APIs and third-party libraries.
Helped scale the platform to 2.2M+ users who collectively built over 5.2M Android applications.
Worked across platform engineering, Android runtime systems, backend infrastructure, and developer tooling.

work.name: Highway to Highradius Internship Program
work.summary: Learnt and built an ML-based fullstack project.

work.name: Socommerz
highlights: Bootstrapped a Multi-Tenant SaaS-based Campaign Manager.
Built components of a Global E-commerce Engine.
Worked on a Food-Tech Platform to aggregate Home Chefs.

work.name: Google Summer of Code × MIT App Inventor
work.description: App Inventor is a project that democratizes mobile app development
work.summary: Researched and developed a prototype enabling visible component extensions on the MIT App Inventor platform; implemented iframe-based sandboxing for secure execution of untrusted extension code.

volunteer.summary: Led technical initiatives and hosted workshops on Android and Kotlin Study Jams.
Learnt Google Cloud Platform, networking, and troubleshooting.

education.institution: SRM Institute of Science and Technology

certificates.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Foundations 2021 Certified Associate
Fundamentals of Red Hat Enterprise Linux

projects.name: based
projects.description: Rust-based systems/developer tooling project focused on performance, simplicity, and low-level control. Explores modern Rust patterns around async systems programming and tooling ergonomics.

projects.name: jot
projects.description: Experimental Rust project exploring lightweight developer workflows and performant tooling. Focused on clean architecture, portability, and minimal abstractions.

projects.name: vector
projects.description: A feature-rich SVG editor with advanced filter and animation capabilities. Built drag-and-drop canvas editor with real-time SVG rendering, auto-save, undo/redo history, and comprehensive keyboard shortcuts.

projects.name: PlayBadges
projects.description: Dynamic SVG badge service displaying Android app metrics from Google Play Store. Built a serverless API using Hono for high-performance badge generation integrated with Google Play Store APIs.

openSource.name: MIT App Inventor
openSource.description: External contributor focused on Android and Java systems.
